prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次依次约39883→36659→33490→36797→30628名，整体呈波动前移趋势；2025年较2024年大幅前移约6169名，竞争明显加剧，基准位次约30628名；该校在贵州省物理类招生计划持续扩招：2021年31人→2022年35人→2023年39人→2024年52人→2025年56人→2026年67人，2026年较2025年扩招11人（+19.6%），扩招幅度较大，对位次有后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜参考校本部中国石油大学（北京）约第62名，近年排名稳定在48–62区间；学校位于新疆克拉玛依，属偏远地区办学；声誉文件中无该校独立记录；抖音热度排名未进入前106名，曝光度一般；投档异常记录中未见该校，近年录取平稳；该校以石油石化特色为主，石油工程、化学工程与工艺、资源勘查工程等为传统优势专业；学科评估数据中校本部相关学科未单独列出，整体工科实力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、自动化、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐；石油工程、化工等传统工科热度平稳；贵州省2026年普通高考总人数约29.9万，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约29.7万略有增加，竞争压力小幅上升；学校位于新疆克拉玛依，距贵州较远，地域偏好对贵州考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移反映的竞争加剧趋势、2026年扩招19.6%带来的位次后移压力、以及本省考生总数小幅增加，考虑竞争惯性适当收紧，预测2026年物理类最低位次约34038名，区间33538–34538名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 39883 → 36659 → 33490 → 36797 → 30628, showing an overall fluctuating forward trend; in 2025, it moved significantly forward by about 6169 places compared to 2024, indicating intensified competition, with a baseline ranking of about 30628; the university's enrollment plan in Guizhou Province for Physics Category has been continuously expanding: 31 in 2021 → 35 in 2022 → 39 in 2023 → 52 in 2024 → 56 in 2025 → 67 in 2026, with an increase of 11 places (+19.6%) in 2026 compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, exerting backward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; on the Soft Science main ranking, referencing the main campus China University of Petroleum (Beijing) at about 62nd place, with recent rankings stable in the 48–62 range; the university is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, a remote area; the reputation file has no independent record for this university; Douyin popularity ranking did not enter the top 106, with average exposure; no abnormal admission records were found for this university, with stable admissions in recent years; the university is characterized by petroleum and petrochemical specialties, with petroleum engineering, chemical engineering and technology, resource exploration engineering as traditional advantageous majors; in the discipline evaluation data, related disciplines of the main campus are not separately listed, but overall engineering strength is strong.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Automation, Electrical Engineering have high social popularity and are highly recommended; traditional engineering majors like Petroleum Engineering and Chemical Engineering have stable popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou Province general college entrance examination is about 299,000, a slight increase from the total of about 297,000 for Physics and History Categories in 2025, leading to a slight increase in competition pressure; the university is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, far from Guizhou, and regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Guizhou candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the intensified competition reflected by the significant forward shift in 2025 rankings, the backward pressure from the 19.6% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province, with appropriate tightening due to competition inertia, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 34038, with a range of 33538–34538.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 33538–34538, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation, Accounting, Chemical Engineering and Technology, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Automation, Computer Science, Petroleum Engineering, etc.) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Resource Exploration, Environmental Engineering, Finance, etc.) as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) were approximately 6770 → 6214 → 5805 → 4624 → 4705, showing an overall upward trend, stabilizing in the 4600–4700 range in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is about 4705; the enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou for History Category was 7 in 2021, 8 in 2022, and 6 from 2023 to 2026, with 2026 unchanged from 2025, no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking references the main campus at about 62nd; located in Karamay, Xinjiang, a remote area, with relatively limited appeal to liberal arts students; no independent record of this university in reputation documents; Douyin popularity not ranked; no abnormal filing records seen; liberal arts majors only include Chinese Language and Literature, Accounting, and Ideological and Political Education, with no separate listing of related disciplines from the main campus in discipline evaluation data.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The number of History Category examinees in Guizhou has been declining in recent years (99331 in 2024 → 90087 in 2025), with total examinees about 299,000 in 2026 but the proportion of History Category may continue to decrease, slightly easing competition pressure; the university is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, far from Guizhou, with few liberal arts majors, and regional preference has a certain inhibitory effect on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the unchanged enrollment plan, the continued decline in the number of History Category examinees, and the stable ranking in the 4600–4700 range in the last two years, along with slightly eased competition due to fewer examinees, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 4735, with a range of 4235–5235.
